## CSSValue type

Represents the types of values that can be interpolated into a template.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type CSSValue<TSource, TParent = any> = Expression<TSource, any, TParent> | Binding<TSource, any, TParent> | ComposableStyles | CSSDirective;
```
**References:** [Expression](./fast-element.expression.md)<!-- -->, [Binding](./fast-element.binding.md)<!-- -->, [ComposableStyles](./fast-element.composablestyles.md)<!-- -->, [CSSDirective](./fast-element.cssdirective.md)
